channel.title: KAZE 風 — Anime & Motion Design Studio
channel.description: Selected works, case studies and studio notes from KAZE — a Tokyo-based anime and motion design studio.

item.title: Neon Drifter — Case Study
item.description: A 12-episode cyberpunk road saga rendered with hand-painted light leaks and generative cityscapes that breathe with the score.

item.title: Crimson Lotus — Case Study
item.description: A period fantasy feature told through ink-wash transitions and frame-by-frame combat choreography rooted in kabuki rhythm.

item.title: Echoes of Tomorrow — Case Study
item.description: A 4-minute audioreactive piece syncing particle motion to a live-recorded synth score, built entirely in code.

item.title: Silent Horizon — Case Study
item.description: A wordless meditation on isolation, built from long holds, minimal palette, and tidal motion.

item.title: Paper Moons — Case Study
item.description: A tender coming-of-age story wrapped in cut-paper textures and stop-motion-inspired timing.

item.title: Void Walker — Case Study
item.description: A real-time cinematic trailer blending anime silhouette acting with volumetric, rendered depth.
